name: Basecamp
description: Basecamp is a project management and team collaboration platform. Use this API to manage projects, todolists, todos, messages, comments, campfires, schedule entries, uploads, webhooks, and people.

capabilities.name: projects_list
capabilities.description: List all projects in the Basecamp account, including active and archived projects.

capabilities.name: projects_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific project by its ID.

capabilities.name: projects_create
capabilities.description: Create a new project in the Basecamp account.

capabilities.name: projects_update
capabilities.description: Update a project's name or description.

capabilities.name: projects_delete
capabilities.description: Trash a project (deleted after 30 days).

capabilities.name: people_list
capabilities.description: List all people (team members) in a Basecamp account.

capabilities.name: people_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific person by their ID.

capabilities.name: people_my_profile
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile.

capabilities.name: people_list_project
capabilities.description: List all people on a specific project.

capabilities.name: people_update_access
capabilities.description: Grant or revoke project access for people.

capabilities.name: todolists_list
capabilities.description: List all todolists in a todoset.

capabilities.name: todolists_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific todolist by ID.

capabilities.name: todolists_create
capabilities.description: Create a new todolist in a todoset.

capabilities.name: todolists_update
capabilities.description: Update a todolist's name or description.

capabilities.name: todos_list
capabilities.description: List all todos in a todolist.

capabilities.name: todos_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific todo by ID.

capabilities.name: todos_create
capabilities.description: Create a new todo in a todolist with optional assignees and due date.

capabilities.name: todos_update
capabilities.description: Update a todo's content, assignees, or due date.

capabilities.name: todos_complete
capabilities.description: Mark a todo as complete.

capabilities.name: todos_uncomplete
capabilities.description: Mark a completed todo as incomplete.

capabilities.name: todos_reposition
capabilities.description: Change the position of a todo within its list.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: List all messages on a project's message board.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific message by ID.

capabilities.name: messages_create
capabilities.description: Post a new message to a project's message board.

capabilities.name: messages_update
capabilities.description: Update a message's subject or content.

capabilities.name: comments_list
capabilities.description: List all comments on a recording (message, todo, etc).

capabilities.name: comments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific comment by ID.

capabilities.name: comments_create
capabilities.description: Add a comment to any recording (message, todo, etc).

capabilities.name: comments_update
capabilities.description: Update a comment's content.

capabilities.name: campfires_list
capabilities.description: List all campfires (chat rooms) in the account.

capabilities.name: campfires_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific campfire by ID.

capabilities.name: campfire_lines_list
capabilities.description: List all lines (messages) in a campfire.

capabilities.name: campfire_lines_create
capabilities.description: Post a new message (line) to a campfire.

capabilities.name: campfire_lines_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a campfire line (message).

capabilities.name: schedule_entries_list
capabilities.description: List all schedule entries in a project schedule.

capabilities.name: schedule_entries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific schedule entry.

capabilities.name: schedule_entries_create
capabilities.description: Create a new schedule entry in a project schedule.

capabilities.name: schedule_entries_update
capabilities.description: Update a schedule entry.

capabilities.name: uploads_list
capabilities.description: List all uploads in a project vault.

capabilities.name: uploads_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific upload by ID.

capabilities.name: uploads_create
capabilities.description: Create a new upload in a vault.

capabilities.name: uploads_update
capabilities.description: Update an upload's description or filename.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhooks for a project.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific webhook by ID.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook for a project to receive real-time event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook's URL, types, or active status.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.
